content.full_text:
October 10, 2002

Ron Burns
Summit-ITC Corp.
417 Mace Blvd. Suite J
Davis, CA 95616-6053

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-270

Dear Mr. Burns:

Pursuant to your telephone conversation with our office on October 2, 2002, this letter confirms that you are withdrawing your request for reconsideration of our advice letter to your employee, Byron Roberts, dated September 12, 2002 (No. A-02-190). I am returning the original of that letter to you, which you provided as an enclosure with your request for reconsideration.

As we also discussed, I enclose for your information four advice letters that may pertain to your situation. Each of these letters addresses the one-year ban under the Political Reform Act’s post-employment provisions.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Kenneth L. Glick
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosures (5)
KLG:jg
